/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/unit_lockfree_queue_test.dir/unit_lockfree_queue.cpp.o -o unit_lockfree_queue_test  ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../lib/libgtest.a
